'''Sam Snootles''',<ref name=":0">[[Star Wars: Clone Wars Volume Two|''Star Wars: Clone Wars'' Volume Two]]</ref> a [[Pa'lowick/Legends|Pa'lowick]], was seen on his way to a business for his day at work on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. He carried a briefcase and wore a tie.<ref name=":1">{{CW|21}}</ref> He shared his surname with fellow Pa'lowick [[Musician|Singer]] [[Sy Snootles/Legends|Sy Snootles]].<ref name="Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi">{{Film|VI}}</ref>

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Sam Snootles was a background character in the ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars]]'' series of cartoons.<ref name=":1" /> The name was derived from the audio commentary on the DVD.<ref name=":0" />
